positive: A mystical bioluminescent jungle scene viewed at twilight. The central composition features large, stylized tropical leaves and exotic flora glowing with shades of neon cyan, emerald green, and deep magenta. Subtle, glowing outlines on the edges of the leaves and vines create a strong, clean silhouette effect. Include gentle atmospheric fog and floating bioluminescent particles. The style should be highly detailed vector art mixed with neo-art nouveau engraving aesthetics, emphasizing crisp lines, clean edges, and high contrast. Use a deep indigo background gradient to make the glowing elements pop. Focus on symmetry and powerful graphic impact, suitable for a wearable print design.
negative: blur, artifact, watermark, signature, text, low resolution, grainy, noise, smudged, extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformed, poorly drawn hands
